_meta.notes: Goal: empty venue ready for LED screen install. The screen itself is rendered LATER by our canvas. So prompts ask for a clean dark wall / stage / facade in the eye-level shot, no LED in frame.
_meta.shared_negative: no LED screen in frame, no people, no text, no logos, no brand markings, no specific landmarks

prompts.title: Малая презентация / камерный зал
prompts.prompt: Completely empty modern indoor presentation room, eye-level frontal view of front wall, dark front wall only, no projection screen, no LED panel, no white surface, no display whatsoever, just dark empty wall ready for screen installation, soft warm overhead lighting, minimalist corporate interior, polished concrete floor, neutral grey walls, professional architectural photography, sharp focus, clean composition, photorealistic, ultra detailed, ABSOLUTELY no people anywhere, no audience, no silhouettes, no human figures, no operators, no chairs in main view, no logos, no text
